creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-13 09:04:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/truc           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/truc/files     pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Truc is a web-based tool for requirement and use case tracking.
  It has fileupload, discussions, version control, use case
  history, build and release management. It supports assignment
  of requirements & use cases to releases and filtering over all
  fields.
  
  WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/truc/
  
  PR:             ports/110171
  Submitted by:   Jan Siml <jsi at jules.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2684    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/devel/truc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/truc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/devel/truc/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/devel/truc/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1845 -0   ports/devel/truc/pkg-plist (new)
